enrichment.summary: Kyle attempts his first recorded bi-weekly history test, using a random number generator to select decades from 0–2000 AD and spending one minute each recalling historical events from memory. He goes through approximately 60 decades in one hour, covering ancient Rome, medieval Europe, the Islamic world, the Mongol Empire, early modern exploration, and 20th-century events. At the end he explains his grading and upload schedule for the series.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Bi-weekly timed recall tests are a useful way to study and track progress
Admits he is bad at it and it doesn't motivate him to study harder
Claims descent from Maximinus, a Roman-era general
Will grade himself on camera to both document accuracy and reinforce learning before the next test
